creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text: GL_COMMIT blocks portscout version probing, exacerbated by https://gitlab.com/gitlab-org/gitlab/-/issues/267523 Currently, the only way to detect new versions on GitLab-hosted projects is via Repology or out-of-band (*-announce@ list, IRC, Twitter, Reddit, etc). This makes it easy to miss security/stability releases by maintainers with many ports (out-of-band doesn't scale for >100 ports due to noise).
